tool.name: tripadvisor_compare_hotels
tool.description: Compare hotels in a destination on TripAdvisor. Searches for hotels and returns up to 15 results with name, price, rating, review count, star class, and amenity highlights for easy comparison.

parameters.name: destination
parameters.description: Destination city or area (e.g. 'Paris', 'Manhattan New York', 'Bali')
